sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: AVS - Futebol SAD are in dire form, winless in their last 5 matches with 3 losses and 2 draws, struggling at the bottom of the table with just 4 points. Moreirense, despite not winning in their last 5 matches (2 draws, 3 losses), have shown resilience with late goals and sit comfortably at 8th with 21 points.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In their last two encounters, Moreirense dominated AVS, winning both matches with an aggregate score of 6-0. AVS have failed to score against Moreirense and have not kept a clean sheet in these games.

sections.subtitle: Team Statistics
sections.text: AVS have struggled defensively, conceding 41 goals this season (worst in the league), while their attack has managed only 11 goals. Moreirense have a balanced record with 21 goals scored and 24 conceded, showing more threat in the final third.

sections.subtitle: Key Players
sections.text: For AVS, Óscar Perea (2 goals) and Tomané will be crucial in breaking their scoring drought. Moreirense’s Guilherme Schettine (8 goals) and Alan (2 goals, 4 assists) are in fine form and could exploit AVS’s defensive frailties.

sections.subtitle: Match Outlook
sections.text: Given Moreirense’s superior league position, head-to-head dominance, and better attacking output, they are clear favorites as per Sofascore’s prediction (64% away win). AVS’s poor form and defensive issues make an upset unlikely, though a draw (22%) remains a slight possibility.
